info.title: Sportuno Operator API
info.description:
B2B API for external betting operators to integrate Sportuno tournaments.

## Authentication

### Tier 2: API Key (Read-only catalog access)
Read-only access to tournament catalog, events, and leaderboards.

**Required Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer sk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx`
- `X-Operator-ID: {operator-uuid}`

### Widget JWT (Player actions)
Player enrollment, rebuy, and addon operations are performed through the embedded widget
using widget session tokens (JWT). These tokens are created via the session creation API
and contain player context (operator_id, operator_player_id, player_currency).

**Required Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {widget-session-jwt}`
- `Origin: {operator-site-origin}`

## Rate Limits
- Tier 2 (catalog): 500 requests/minute
- Widget (player actions): 100 requests/minute per player

## Player Actions via Widget
All player mutations (enroll, rebuy, addon) are performed via widget JWT authentication.
The JWT contains the player's operator_id, operator_player_id, and currency.

get.summary: Get markets for a specific event (Tier 2: API Key authentication)
get.description:
GET /v1/events/:id/markets

Returns markets for a single event with optional filtering and selections.
Supports progressive disclosure pattern: load markets only when event is expanded.

## Query Parameters

- `category=popular` - Return only featured markets (1X2, WIN, MATCH_ODDS, OVER_UNDER, BTTS, MONEY_LINE)
- `limit=50` - Maximum markets to return (1-200, default: 50)
- `offset=0` - Number of markets to skip (default: 0)
- `include_selections=true` - Include selections in response (default: true)

## Example Requests

```text
# All markets for an event (with selections)
GET /v1/events/{id}/markets

# Featured markets only (mobile optimized)
GET /v1/events/{id}/markets?category=popular

# Markets without selections (faster loading)
GET /v1/events/{id}/markets?include_selections=false

# Paginated markets
GET /v1/events/{id}/markets?limit=20&offset=0
```

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Event UUID

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category: "popular" for featured markets only

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of markets to return (1-200, default 50)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of markets to skip (default 0)

parameters.name: include_selections
parameters.description: Include selections in response (default: true)

parameters.name: display
parameters.description:
Filter by display status: "true" (default), "false", or "all"
By default only displayed markets are returned.

200.description: List of markets for the event

get.summary: Get leaderboards lobby (Tier 1: API Key authentication)
get.description:
GET /v1/leaderboards

Returns a paginated list of finished and active tournaments with their
top-N leaderboard entries embedded. Optimized for the leaderboards lobby page.

All CMS image URLs (`images.lobby`, `images.tournament`, `images.featured`),
theme colors, tournament groups, and key tournament data fields are included.

Tournaments are ordered: FINISHED (newest end date first), then LIVE (newest start first).
No upcoming tournaments are included.

parameters.name: tournaments_per_page
parameters.description: Tournaments per page (default: 20, max: 100)

parameters.name: leaderboard_size
parameters.description: Top N players per tournament (default: 3, max: 50)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number, 0-indexed (default: 0)

200.description: Leaderboards lobby with embedded top-N rankings

get.summary: Get market selections (Tier 2: API Key authentication)
get.description:
GET /v1/markets/:id/selections

Returns selections for a specific market by ID.

**Note:** This endpoint provides global market access by ID without tournament-scoping.
This is intentional for convenience when you already have a market ID (e.g., from a
previous `/v1/tournaments/{id}/markets` call). For tournament-scoped access with
authorization checks, use `GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/selections` instead.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Market UUID

parameters.name: display
parameters.description:
Filter by display status: "true" (default), "false", or "all"
By default only displayed selections are returned.

200.description: Market with its selections. Note: This endpoint provides global market access without tournament-scoping.

get.summary: Bulk get odds for multiple selections (Tier 2: API Key authentication)
get.description:
GET /v1/odds

Returns odds for multiple selections in a single request.
Optimized for real-time odds display in bet slips and live odds widgets.

## Best Practice for Embed UI

Use this endpoint to efficiently poll odds for:
- **Bet slip** - Poll odds for all selections in the bet slip
- **Live odds widget** - Poll odds for displayed selections
- **Odds change detection** - Compare with previous values to highlight changes

## Example

```text
GET /v1/odds?selection_ids=uuid1,uuid2,uuid3
```

## Response

Returns minimal payload for efficiency:
- selection_id
- odds
- status (Active, Suspended, Closed)
- market_status (for suspended market detection)
- updated_at (for staleness detection)

parameters.name: selection_ids
parameters.description:
Comma-separated selection IDs (max 100)
Example: selection_ids=uuid1,uuid2,uuid3

get.description:
GET /v1/tournaments

Returns published tournaments visible to the operator.
Only tournaments in displayed, allowjoin, allowbetting, or settled status are returned.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: DEPRECATED: Filter by single simplified status (backward compat). Use `statuses` instead.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description:
Filter by simplified status (comma-separated: active, settled, cancelled, voided, draft)
Expanded to raw backend values for SQL query.

parameters.name: raw_statuses
parameters.description:
Filter by raw backend status (comma-separated: displayed, allowjoin, allowbetting, settled)
Direct match on database status column.

parameters.name: display_statuses
parameters.description:
Filter by display status (comma-separated: upcoming, registration_open, live, pending_settlement, settled, cancelled, voided)
Applied post-fetch since display_status is computed from timestamps.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-indexed, must be >= 1)

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Items per page (1-100, default 20)

parameters.name: is_featured
parameters.description: Filter by featured status (for carousel display)

parameters.name: tournament_type
parameters.description: Filter by tournament type (prize_game, free_to_play, qualifier)

parameters.name: sport_icon
parameters.description: Filter by sport icon (football, basketball, tennis, etc.)

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Filter by tournament group ID

get.summary: Get tournament details (Tier 2: API Key authentication)
get.description:
GET /v1/tournaments/:id

Returns detailed tournament information including rebuy/addon configuration.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Tournament UUID

403.description: Operator does not have access to this tournament

404.description: Tournament not found or not visible

post.summary: Execute add-on for the authenticated player
post.description:
POST /v1/tournaments/{id}/addon

Executes an add-on in the specified tournament for the authenticated player.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Tournament UUID

400.description: Add-on not available (outside window, already used, etc.)

post.summary: Enroll the authenticated player in a tournament
post.description:
POST /v1/tournaments/{id}/enroll

Uses player context from the widget JWT (operator_id, operator_player_id, player_currency).
No request body needed - all context comes from the authenticated session.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Tournament UUID

get.summary: Get tournament events with markets and selections (Tier 2: API Key authentication)
get.description:
GET /v1/tournaments/:id/events

Returns events associated with the tournament.

## Best Practice: Flat by Default

Following industry standards (Betfair, Sportradar, Kambi), responses are **flat by default**.
Use query parameters to opt-in to nested data:

### Query Parameters

- `include=markets` - Include markets (no selections)
- `include=markets.selections` - Include markets with selections
- `featured=true` - Only return featured/primary markets (ideal for mobile)
- `max_markets=3` - Limit markets per event (1-50)

### Legacy Parameters (deprecated)

- `include_markets=true` - Use `include=markets` instead
- `include_selections=true` - Use `include=markets.selections` instead

## Example Requests

```text
# Event list (flat, lightweight)
GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/events

# Mobile event list (featured markets only)
GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/events?include=markets.selections&featured=true&max_markets=3

# Full event detail
GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/events?include=markets.selections

# Minimal fields for bandwidth-constrained embed UI
GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/events?fields=id,name,start_time

# With specific fields including markets
GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/events?include=markets&fields=id,name,start_time,markets
```

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Tournament UUID

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
JSON:API style include parameter (recommended)
Examples: "markets", "markets.selections"
When set, overrides boolean flags

parameters.name: include_markets
parameters.description:
Include markets in response (default: false)
DEPRECATED: Use `include=markets` instead

parameters.name: include_selections
parameters.description:
Include selections in response (default: false, requires include_markets)
DEPRECATED: Use `include=markets.selections` instead

parameters.name: featured
parameters.description:
Only return featured/primary markets (default: false)
Featured markets are: Match Winner (1X2), Over/Under, Both Teams to Score
Ideal for mobile event list views

parameters.name: max_markets
parameters.description:
Maximum markets per event (1-50, default: 50)
Use with `featured=false` to limit markets returned

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
Sparse fieldsets: comma-separated list of fields to include
Example: "id,name,start_time,markets"
If not specified, all fields are included

parameters.name: display
parameters.description:
Filter by display status: "true" (default), "false", or "all"
By default only displayed events are returned.

200.description: List of events with optional markets and selections

403.description: Operator does not have access to this tournament

get.description:
GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/leaderboard

Returns the current leaderboard for a tournament, with pagination support.
The leaderboard is automatically scoped to the operator from the authentication
context (Widget JWT or API Key).

Rankings are calculated within the operator's participant set only (internal ranking).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Tournament UUID

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-indexed, must be >= 1)

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Items per page (1-100, default 20)

parameters.name: operator_id
parameters.description:
Optional operator ID filter for operator-scoped leaderboards
When provided, returns only participants from that operator with rankings
calculated within that filtered set

200.description: Tournament leaderboard with rankings and portfolio values

401.description: Authentication required (Widget JWT or API Key)

get.summary: Get the authenticated player's enrollment in a tournament
get.description:
GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/my-enrollment

Returns enrollment status and details for the authenticated player.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Tournament UUID

post.summary: Execute rebuy for the authenticated player
post.description:
POST /v1/tournaments/{id}/rebuy

Executes a rebuy in the specified tournament for the authenticated player.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Tournament UUID

400.description: Rebuy not allowed (cutoff passed, max reached, etc.)

get.summary: Get rebuy status for the authenticated player
get.description:
GET /v1/tournaments/{id}/rebuy-status

Returns rebuy availability and configuration for the authenticated player.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Tournament UUID

ConfiguredThemeEntry.description: A single configured theme entry (Strapi CMS document reference + theme data)

LeaderboardsLobbyResponse.description: Response for the leaderboards lobby endpoint

LeaderboardsPlayerEntry.description: A player entry in the leaderboards lobby

points.description:
Total portfolio value (available balance + open bets cashout value).
This is the authoritative ranking metric.

LeaderboardsTournamentEntry.description: A tournament entry in the leaderboards lobby

groups.description: Tournament groups this tournament belongs to

leaderboard.description: Top N players for this tournament

sport_icon.description: Sport icon slug (e.g., "football", "basketball") — free-form string, CMS is source of truth

themes.description: All configured themes for this tournament (Strapi CMS references)

OperatorApiError.description:
Operator API error details

Provides structured error information with error codes,
human-readable messages, and optional additional context.

details.description: Optional additional error context (e.g., validation errors)

OperatorBulkOddsResponse.description:
Bulk odds response
Minimal payload for efficient real-time odds polling

OperatorEvent.description:
Event with optional nested markets and selections

## Best Practice: Flat by Default

When `markets` is `None`, use `market_count` to show the number of available markets.
This allows the UI to display "45 markets" without loading all market data.

display.description: Whether this event is displayed to end users

market_count.description: Number of markets for this event (shown when markets not included)

sport_id.description: Sport ID (optional - may not be available from all data sources)

OperatorLeaderboardEntry.description: Single leaderboard entry for operator API

points.description: Total portfolio value (available balance + open bets cashout value)

OperatorLeaderboardTournamentInfo.description: Tournament metadata included in the per-tournament leaderboard response

themes.description: All configured themes for this tournament (Strapi CMS references)

OperatorMarket.description:
Market with optional nested selections

## Best Practice

When `selections` is `None`, use `selection_count` to show the number of outcomes.
This allows the UI to display "3 selections" without loading full selection data.

display.description: Whether this market is displayed to end users

display_order.description: Display order for market sorting (lower = shown first, 0 = default)

is_featured.description: Whether this is a featured/primary market (Match Winner, Over/Under, BTTS)

selection_count.description: Number of selections for this market (shown when selections not included)

OperatorOddsItem.description: Single odds item (minimal payload for bulk response)

asset_url.description: URL to selection image (e.g., jockey silks)

display.description: Whether this selection is displayed to end users

odds_updated_at.description: Last time odds were updated (for real-time display)

position.description: Display position/order within the market (lower = shown first)

result.description: Settlement result: WIN, LOSE, VOID, HALF_WIN, HALF_LOSE (null if not yet resulted)

OperatorSelectionsResponse.description:
Operator API selections response for a single market
Response for GET /v1/markets/{id}/selections

display.description: Whether this market is displayed to end users

OperatorTournamentDetail.description:
Detailed tournament information for operator API

Note: status/raw_status/display_status and timestamp fields mirror
`OperatorTournamentSummary` — keep both in sync when adding fields.

display_status.description:
Server-computed display status for FE rendering.
Values: "upcoming", "registration_open", "live", "pending_settlement",
        "settled", "cancelled", "voided"

effective_prize_pool_cents.description:
Effective prize pool for settlement (auto-calculated).
Dynamic mode: accumulated net contributions. Fixed mode: max(guaranteed, accumulated).

join_open_time.description: When registration opens (null if not scheduled)

raw_status.description:
Original backend status for backwards compatibility
(e.g. "displayed", "allowjoin", "allowbetting", "settled", "cancelled", "voided", "created")

registration_deadline.description: When registration closes (null = open until end)

themes.description: All configured themes for this tournament (Strapi CMS references)

display_status.description:
Server-computed display status for FE rendering.
Values: "upcoming", "registration_open", "live", "pending_settlement",
        "settled", "cancelled", "voided"

effective_prize_pool_cents.description:
Effective prize pool for settlement (auto-calculated).
Dynamic mode: accumulated net contributions. Fixed mode: max(guaranteed, accumulated).

is_featured.description: Whether this tournament is featured (shown in carousel)

join_open_time.description: When registration opens (null if not scheduled)

raw_status.description:
Original backend status for backwards compatibility
(e.g. "displayed", "allowjoin", "allowbetting", "settled", "cancelled", "voided", "created")

registration_deadline.description: When registration closes (null = open until end)

themes.description: All configured themes for this tournament (Strapi CMS references)

truncated.description:
True when results were truncated due to safeguard limits.
When truncated, total reflects the collected count, not actual total.

PrizePosition.description: Prize payout tier (matches tournament-service PayoutTier schema)

rebuy_cost.description: Rebuy cost in real currency (if available)

unavailable_reason.description: Reason why rebuy is not available (if applicable)

TournamentGroupInfo.description: Summary of a tournament group for the leaderboards lobby

TournamentImages.description: Nested image URLs for tournament display

featured.description: CDN URL for featured carousel image

lobby.description: CDN URL for lobby card image

tournament.description: CDN URL for tournament detail header

TournamentTheme.description: Nested theme colors for tournament display

primary.description: Primary theme color in hex format (#RRGGBB)

secondary.description: Secondary theme color in hex format (#RRGGBB)

api_key.name: Authorization
api_key.description:
API Key authentication (Tier 2 - Read-only)

Format: `Bearer sk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx` (or sk_test_ for sandbox)

**How to obtain:**
1. Contact Sportuno to register as a B2B operator
2. Receive your API key and operator ID
3. Use API key for all requests

api_key_hmac.name: Authorization
api_key_hmac.description:
API Key + HMAC authentication (Tier 3 - Mutations)

Format: `Bearer sk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx` (same as Tier 2)

**Additional Required Headers for Tier 3:**
- `X-Timestamp`: ISO-8601 datetime (max 5 min skew)
- `X-Request-ID`: Unique UUID per request
- `X-Signature`: HMAC-SHA256 hex signature

**HMAC Signature Calculation:**
```
canonical = METHOD + "\n" + PATH + "\n" + 
X-Timestamp + "\n" + X-Request-ID + "\n" + BODY
signature = hex(HMAC-SHA256(api_secret, canonical))
```

hmac_request_id.name: X-Request-ID
hmac_request_id.description:
Unique request identifier (UUID v4).

**Required** for Tier 3 (mutation) endpoints.

Used for idempotency and replay attack prevention.
Each request must have a unique ID.

hmac_signature.name: X-Signature
hmac_signature.description:
HMAC-SHA256 signature in hex format.

**Required** for Tier 3 (mutation) endpoints.

Calculated over the canonical string using your API secret.

hmac_timestamp.name: X-Timestamp
hmac_timestamp.description:
Current UTC time in ISO-8601 format.

**Required** for Tier 3 (mutation) endpoints.

Example: `2024-01-15T10:30:00Z`

Maximum clock skew: 5 minutes

operator_id.name: X-Operator-ID
operator_id.description:
Your assigned operator UUID.

**Required** for all Operator API endpoints.

Format: `xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx`
